steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The word “though” sets up a contrast between studies of high altitude and studies of below-sea-level locations. The latter have received comparatively little notice, so the former must have received a lot of attention.

steps.title: Select the quantity word
steps.content: Choice B means ambiguous, Choice C means scattered or occasional, and Choice D means early or incomplete. None contrasts with “comparatively little notice.” The needed word means plentiful. The answer is A.
